name: Academia
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN109 using the live Academia source repository and public Academia archives dataset. No standalone website, docs site, API, OpenAPI, or SSE surface has been verified yet.

gap_notes: No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.

surfaces.name: Academia source repository
surfaces.notes: Public Academia source repository for SN109.

surfaces.name: Academia Bittensor archives dataset
surfaces.notes: Public Academia archives dataset repository for Bittensor historical subnet/archive data.

surfaces.name: Academia public roadmap document
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth Markdown roadmap published in the official fx-integral/academia repository at ROADMAP.md. Documents SN109 Academia's incubation-academy vision, program principles, builder journey, 2026 quarterly milestones (Q2 foundation, Q3 cohort incubation, Q4 graduation pathway), and subnet spinout model. The repository README lists a public roadmap with milestones among forthcoming docs; distinct from the academia-archives dataset surface.
